title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.110 - Witness residing out of this state, commission to issue
text:
492.110.  Witness residing out of this state, commission to issue. — When the witness resides out of this state, the party desiring his testimony may sue out of the court in which the suit is pending, or out of the office of the clerk thereof, a commission to take the deposition of the witness.
(RSMo 1939 § 1918) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1754; 1919 § 5441; 1909 § 6385
